title: Mono's Equipment Extravaganza
description:
A resource pack aiming to breathe some new life into Minecraft's armour and equipment.
Now with Dixta's Armory support!
body:
# THIS PACK REQUIRES EMF AND ETF!!! ARMOUR TEXTURES WILL NOT WORK WITHOUT THEM



# What is this?

This is a resource pack I made to change some of the equipment sprites for Minecraft. It changes:
- All sword textures
- All tool textures
- Some ore/ingot textures
- Most armour textures
- The shield texture

![retextures lmfoa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a17142aec0fefe7cb7c90dab585f7e006df63fcb.png)

Lookin' for something to make the rest of the game fit these textures? Check out Whimscape! 

*Not affiliated with kavast, their resource pack is just cool af

This pack isn't going for "vanilla like" or anything, I simply made this because I absolutely loathe the vanilla metal T-shirt chestplates. This pack works with Hold My Items!!
Enjoy!
